category_sources: source_facts.description says Open Trace Format 2 file handling library; official OTF2 docs say the library provides an interface to write and read trace data and is developed within the Score-P project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is otf2; official documentation title is Open Trace Format 2 and uses OTF2.
docs_sources: official OTF2 HTML and PDF manuals are hosted under perftools.pages.jsc.fz-juelich.de; VI-HPS tool documentation links to the OTF2 User Manual under the Score-P tool family.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official OTF2 documentation and source_facts.source-archive identify official release artifacts, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify an Open Trace Format 2 library with CLI tools; official docs describe reading and writing trace data and usage of OTF2 tools.
